CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Student__c)), HYPERLINK( '/' & Student__c, TRIM( BLANKVALUE(Candidate__r.FirstName, '') & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Candidate__r.MiddleName)), ' ' & Candidate__r.MiddleName, '' ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Candidate__r.LastName)), ' ' & Candidate__r.LastName, '' ) ), '_blank' ), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Candidate__c)), HYPERLINK( '/' & Candidate__c, TRIM( BLANKVALUE(Candidate__r.FirstName, '') & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Candidate__r.MiddleName)), ' ' & Candidate__r.MiddleName, '' ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Candidate__r.LastName)), ' ' & Candidate__r.LastName, '' ) ), '_blank' ), NULL ) )
CustomField.label: Candidate
